title: 001199 with three-seed RealMLP core
summary: Use a three-seed equal-average RealMLP core with the same CatBoost correction as 001199.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one extra RealMLP seed to the existing two-seed core and average all three RealMLP prediction streams before the CatBoost blend. Keep CatBoost settings and folds stable.
expected_effect: Capture most of the multi-seed benefit at lower cost than four seeds.
risk: The third seed may be too correlated and add little beyond runtime.
